email_subject: Content & Social Media Marketeer - Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear AU FLAN BRETON team,

I am writing to apply for the Content & Social Media Marketeer position. As a junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in content creation, social media integration, and performance tracking, I am excited about the opportunity to bring your bakery's story to life across Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook.

In my current role at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blog content, and build WordPress sites. On my own project, mirook.com, I have created and scheduled social media content, integrated Instagram and Facebook feeds, and used analytics to refine strategy. I am comfortable filming and editing short-form video, writing engaging captions, and measuring performance with Meta Business Suite and Google Analytics.

I am creative, self-starting, and fluent in Dutch (A2, actively improving). I would love to discuss how I can help grow AU FLAN BRETON's brand.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear AU FLAN BRETON team,

I am thrilled to apply for the Content & Social Media Marketeer role. Your description of an ambitious bakery chain with room to grow its brand resonates with me — I am a junior digital marketer who thrives on creating content that people actually watch and measuring what works.

At Episto, I manage on-page SEO and write keyword-targeted blog content, but my real passion is content creation. On my project mirook.com, I designed and built the entire WordPress site, integrated Instagram and Facebook feeds, and created social media posts to build an online presence. I am comfortable filming and editing short-form video, writing captions that fit the brand voice, and using analytics to refine strategy.

I am particularly drawn to your vision of building an event like a rave or bike tour. I have experience coordinating projects independently and would love to take ownership of such initiatives. I am also eager to contribute to packaging and merchandising ideas.

I work well both creatively and analytically — I can brainstorm a Reel series and then dive into Meta Business Suite to see how it performed. I am self-starting, proactive, and fluent in Dutch (A2, actively improving). I am available as a flexi-job or student job and can start immediately.

I would love to meet and discuss how I can help AU FLAN BRETON's story reach more people.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Created and scheduled social media content (Instagram, Facebook) for mirook.com, including short-form video and captions
Built and maintained WordPress sites with Elementor, integrating social media feeds and optimizing for engagement
Tracked performance using Google Analytics, Search Console, and SEMrush to guide content and social strategy
Wrote keyword-targeted blog content and captions that align with brand voice and drive organic traffic
Self-starter with project ownership experience, comfortable working independently and proactively
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · Content · Social Media · SEO
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in content creation, social media management, and performance tracking. At Episto, I run on-page SEO and write keyword-targeted content; on my own project mirook.com, I create and schedule social media posts (Instagram, Facebook), film and edit short-form video, and use analytics to refine strategy. Comfortable with Meta Business Suite, Google Analytics, and content management. Creative, self-starting, and fluent in Dutch (A2, actively improving). Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp.

CORE SKILLS
- Social media content creation & scheduling (Instagram, Facebook, TikTok)
- Short-form video filming & editing (Reels, stories)
- Content writing: captions, blog posts, SEO-optimized copy
- Analytics & reporting: Meta Business Suite, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs
- Content management: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, structured data
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, Social Media & SEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Created and scheduled social media content, including short-form video and captions, to build online presence
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema) and ran technical SEO/GEO audits to improve search visibility

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
